testcase.name: loadHome resets selectedTabIndex to 0 on successful reload
onTabSelected emits a ScrollToSection event with the chosen index
exposes errorMessage and clears isLoading on failure
exposes loaded sections and clears isLoading on success
onTabSelected correctly stores different tab indices
onScrolledToSection updates selectedTabIndex without emitting a scroll event
isLoading is true immediately after construction, before the use-case emits
loadHome clears the previous error and sets isLoading before re-fetching
loadHome delivers new sections after a previous failure
onScrolledToSection does nothing when the index is already selected
onScrolledToSection updates tab when scrolling to a different section
